arts.ttl: “Great appointment” | West Ham prepared to make huge change to bring in fan’s first choice manager
arts.sum: West Ham could be about to completely change the way the club is run with manager appointment. An unconvincing win against Wolves leaves Julen Lopetegui’s future up in the air. On one hand, his side won the game, on the other they were lucky to do so. If he does stay for at least another... arts.ttl: “Keen on the move” | West Ham could make baffling decision to reappoint Moyes
arts.sum: West Ham could do the unthinkable as David Moyes return rumours have begun. Following his departure at the end of last season, David Moyes has been extremely open about how he feels about West Ham. Perhaps understandably, Moyes feels hard done by. He achieved things us fans would never have dreamed of. Anyone who supported... arts.ttl: Soucek: That goal was for you, Michail
arts.sum: Midfielder Tomas Soucek dedicated his goal in West Ham United's 2-1 home win over Wolverhampton Wanderers to team-mate Michail Antonio on an emotional night at the London Stadium. Soucek revealed that the players had a video call with Antonio before the game, wishing his team-mates the best for their match against Wolves.

arts.ttl: “Lucky to win” | West Ham’s uninspiring win against Wolves may give Lopetegui more time
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui relief as a dismal West Ham display vs Wolves may be enough to keep him in a job. West Ham were lucky to be playing one of the worst teams in the Premier League in Wolves. While they did dominate the ball and have the better chances – this says a lot more... arts.ttl: Michail Antonio had video call with West Ham team before their win over Wolves
arts.sum: The Hammers striker is recovering after a horror car crash on Saturday.

arts.ttl: O'Neil defends Wolves position - and takes another swipe at VAR
arts.sum: Wolves manager Gary O'Neil says he understands the anger from his own fanbase towards him - but defended his record at Molineux after the pressure ramped up following defeat at West Ham.

arts.ttl: Gary O'Neil hails Wolves for fighting spirit despite Mario Lemina row at West Ham
arts.sum: Gary O'Neil said all was fine with Mario Lemina after the Wolves captain hit out at his own players and staff after difficult 2-1 defeat away to West Ham that keeps them four points from safety

arts.ttl: West Ham United 2-1 Wolves: Gary O'Neil claims 'four key decisions' went against visitors in 'El Sackico'
arts.sum: Gary O'Neil claims that Wolverhampton Wanderers were on the receiving end of four key decisions as they succumbed to a 2-1 defeat at West Ham United on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Just 2 wins from 15 - why Gary O'Neil's Wolves are struggling in the Premier League this season
arts.sum: A 2-1 defeat to West Ham on Wednesday night kept Wolves stuck in the bottom three of the Premier League table and piled more pressure on under-fire manager Gary O'Neil. The...

arts.ttl: West Ham punish woeful Wolves defence in home win
arts.sum: West Ham United's Jarrod Bowen struck midway through the second half to secure a deserved 2-1 Premier League home win over Wolverhampton Wanderers, whose poor defending cost them again as they languish second-bottom in the standings.
